items.situation: two students talking about a campus photography exhibit one just visited

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, did you make it to that new photography exhibit at the campus gallery?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I did, yesterday afternoon. Honestly, the black-and-white street photos were incredible. I ended up staying almost two hours.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Two hours? Wow. Was it crowded? I heard everyone's been going since it opened.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It wasn't bad in the afternoon, actually. Mornings are packed, but by three the rooms were pretty quiet.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good to know. I'll try to swing by after my seminar tomorrow, then.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely do. And grab the free audio guide at the entrance; it explains the background of each series.

questions.stem: What does the man suggest the woman do at the exhibit?

options.A: Pick up the free audio guide at the entrance
options.B: Arrive in the morning to avoid the crowds
options.C: Buy a ticket before her afternoon seminar
options.D: Plan to stay for at least two hours

questions.explanation: 男生最后建议她在入口处拿免费的语音导览，所以 A 正确。B 与事实相反——男生说早上人很多，不是让她早上去。C 无中生有，展览是免费的，没提到买票。D 张冠李戴，两小时是男生自己待的时间，不是他的建议。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about visiting the gallery in the afternoon?

options.A: It requires booking a reservation ahead
options.B: It costs more than a morning visit
options.C: It is less crowded than in the morning
options.D: It closes earlier than on weekdays

questions.explanation: 男生说下午人不多，早上很挤，到三点房间就很安静了，可推断下午比早上人少，C 正确。A、B、D 都是对话没有依据的推断：没有提到预约、票价差异或提前闭馆。

items.situation: a student asking a cafe worker about a water bottle left behind

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hi, I think I left a blue water bottle here yesterday, near the window seats. Has anyone turned one in?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Let me check the lost and found box behind the counter. We do get a lot of bottles, actually.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Thanks. It's a metal one with a couple of stickers, dented on the bottom.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, I see two blue ones here. Oh, is this the one with the mountain sticker?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yes, that's it! I can't believe it's still here. Thank you so much.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: No worries. Next time, just ask at the counter; we keep things about a week.

questions.stem: What is the man trying to find?
questions.explanation: 男生一开始就说他把一个蓝色水瓶落在这里了，所以 B 正确。A 完全没提到手套。C 把“金属”这个细节安到了饭盒上，其实是水瓶。D 把“贴纸”这个细节挪到了笔记本上，误导性干扰。

questions.stem: What does the woman suggest the man do in the future?

options.A: Check the window seats on his own
options.B: Buy a replacement bottle at the cafe
options.C: Return to look within the same day
options.D: Ask at the counter about lost items

questions.explanation: 女生最后说下次直接到柜台问，他们会保管失物大约一周，可推断她建议以后到柜台询问失物，D 正确。A、B、C 都不是她的建议：她没让他自己去找座位，没提买新瓶子，也没说当天回来。

items.situation: two students deciding between a jazz night and a film festival on the same evening

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: There's a jazz night at the student union on Saturday, but the film festival's the same evening. I can't decide.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, tough call. I went to the jazz night last month, and it was fun, but pretty loud and packed.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? I was leaning toward that. Maybe the festival is more my speed, then. What's playing?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: A couple of documentaries, I think. They're showing them outdoors on the quad, so bring a jacket.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Outdoors sounds lovely. Okay, I'll go with the festival. Want to come along?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, why not. Let's meet at the quad around seven.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: Which weekend event the woman should attend
options.B: How to buy tickets for a jazz concert
options.C: Why the film festival was moved outdoors
options.D: Where to meet for a group study session

questions.explanation: 整段对话都在讨论女生周六该去爵士之夜还是电影节，所以 A 概括了主旨。B 只抓住“爵士”这一个细节且对话没提买票。C 把“户外”这个细节夸大成整段主题。D 完全是另一个话题，属于张冠李戴。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the man's opinion of the jazz night?

options.A: He thought it was too expensive
options.B: He hopes to attend it again this weekend
options.C: He found it enjoyable but noisy
options.D: He never actually went to it

questions.explanation: 男生说他上个月去过爵士之夜，很好玩但又吵又挤，可推断他觉得好玩但太吵，C 正确。A 没提到价格。B 与语气相反，他并没有表示想再去。D 与事实相反，他明确说自己去过。
